title: Portuguese Train Signs
description: This is a resource Pack for MTR mod that adds Signs Portuguese Train Signs used all across Portugal
body:
# Portuguese Signage Resource Pack for MTR Mod
# 
Transform your Minecraft train stations with authentic Portuguese flair! This resource pack is specially designed for the "MTR" (Minecraft Transit Railway) Mod, adding official signage used by IP - Infraestruturas de Portugal across the country. With this pack, the possibilities for recreating Portuguese train stations in Minecraft expand significantly, bringing more realism and unique details to your game world. Try it now and give your railways a distinctive Portuguese charm!

This Resource Pack adds to MTR the following Icons for Train Station Signs:

- Red Arrows
- Blue Arrows
- Platform number indicators from 1 to 9
- Informations
- Waiting Room
- Toilets
- Wifi Zone
- Metro de Lisboa Logo
- CP-Comboios de Portugal Logo
- Trains
- Buses
- Metro
- Ticket Machine
- Ticket Office
- Parking
- Bike Parking
- Commercial Zone

![All the Signs included in the Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc1191358b386ea8d6c5d35510734cd23fcdbe84.png)

![Platforms 2 and 3](https://i.imgur.com/BeQ5Ydq.png)

![irl indicators](https://www.fotoviajar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/estacao-comboios-evora.jpg)
